heading: Tissue bank
label: 943 Tissue bank
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–440, title II, § 201106 Stat. 2233Oct. 23, 1992“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as ‘The Great Lakes Fish and Wildlife Tissue Bank Act’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–440, title II, § 201106 Stat. 2233Oct. 23, 1992“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as ‘The Great Lakes Fish and Wildlife Tissue Bank Act’.”

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate existing facilities for the storage, preparation, examination, and archiving of tissues from selected Great Lakes fish and wildlife, which shall be known as the “Great Lakes Fish and Wildlife Tissue Bank”.
appropriate uniform methods and standards for those activities to provide confidence in Great Lakes fish and wildlife tissue samples used for research;
documentation of procedures used for collecting, preparing, and archiving those samples; and
appropriate scientific use of the tissues in the Great Lakes Fish and Wildlife Tissue Bank.
